mission.title: lima: Add support for VNC, in addition to the current QEMU displays
mission.description: Add support for VNC, in addition to the current QEMU displays. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current lima setup
steps.description:
Verify your lima version and configuration:
```bash
limactl --version
```
This feature requires a working lima installation.

steps.title: Review lima configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant lima configuration:
The qemu display might slow down the host, and the window be in the way...

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add support for VNC, in addition to the current QEMU…
steps.description:
The other display options open a window always, while the
vnc is more "on demand" by using a separate vnc viewer.
    
Add localhost and password support for some minimal security.
The password is generated, and is stored as an instance file.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Add support for VNC, in addition to the current QEMU…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
The other display options open a window always, while the
vnc is more "on demand" by using a separate vnc viewer.
    
Add localhost and password support for some minimal security.
The password is generated, and is stored as an instance file.

prerequisites.description: A working lima installation or development environment.
